definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: It rained heavily; consequently, the match was canceled.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He didn't study; hence his failure.]

definitions.usage_context_en: As a consequence; for this reason.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He is sick; therefore, he will not come.]

definitions.usage_context_en: For that reason; consequently (used in formal speech or writing).
